segments.text: We have assembled here to celebrate the Sahastradi, which was opened in 1970 on this date.
I find that beautiful canopy is like our Sahasrara and so very apt for having this
beautiful arrangement for Sahastrara.
We have to understand what happens
when the Sahasrara opens,
When Kundalini passes through five centers
it enters into an area which we call as limbic area
This area is all surrounded by thousand nerves
and then these nerves get enlightened
They look like flames of bibji or seven colors and very mindfully, beautifully shining emitting
peace.
But when the Kundalini starts emitting its vibration on their sides all these nerves
Get enlightened gradually and start moving on all directions, opening the Sahasrara.
And then a Kundalini emerges out through fontanel bone area which we call as Brahma Randra
Randhra means the whole, and the Brahma is all-pervading power of God's love.
So it enters into this subtle energy which we do not feel normally but then the chaitanya
And the vibrations which are part and parcel of this energy, all-pervading power, the Paramachaitanya
they start entering into our brain.
I am showering their blessings in the limbic area there as well now that limbic area
is connected to all the area of brain and also
To the nerves. So it starts flowing onto
The nerves giving you new awareness
Of collective consciousness called as Samuhik Chetana
so, You get a new chetanah
A New awareness which is showered upon
Your limbic area
The working of these Chaitanya waves is very interesting.
They are normally formed like small commas,
but then they go into different forms
–they make themselves into swastikas
as the four-limbed symbol
of innocence or they become the omkara, as you know how om is written here.
Which it's a symbol
Of our doing
Our awareness
So when
They form
The swastika
Then try
To nourish
Their left side
And then they form
Omkara
They nourished their right side
left and right sympathetic nervous system they nourish.
But Sahastrara is to be kept open,
it's rather difficult for people because its a vicious circle
First these vibrations should enter into your brain
through the Brahmarandra when It has opened out
And They Should Nourish Your nerves
by which their Left & Right side opens up
And so more chaitanya can slow down all these centers.
But if your Sahastrara is not properly opened, this process doesn't take place?
As a result of that the chakras don' t open – The Kundalini only has very few strands
is kept in the spinal cord,
The new strands cannot rise
because your chakras are not open.
So it Sahaja Yoga
It's very important to keep
Your Sahasrara opened
Otherwise there´s a vicious circle
To Keep the Sahastrara Open
Is In A Way Very Easy
As Well As Difficult
As you have known in the Devi Mahatma, that at Sahastrara Maha Maya comes.
She is a Maha Maya – not easy to recognize Her ,not easy know her .She lives just like
You she moves Just Like YOU and you can never make out Her real nature.
She is in the form of Mahamaya.
So at Sahastrara, to recognize
that Maha Maya
Is another vicious circle
You may say why should it be Maha Maya?
Should have been better as talkingly some other form
But any other form could not
Have worked out Sahaja Yoga
In modern times
Because people would've been frightened
And upset
They would never have taken to Sahaja Yoga because they had no discretion already within
them, know what is right and wrong.
That's why it has been in the Mahamaya form – you've got to recognize this
as another test!
Because Maha Maya cannot be recognized while you have to recognize.
But in Sahaja Yoga you have seen so many photographs, which should convince
You people mentally about this Mahamaya Swarupa.
You can see mentally that there is something very different
Even when I came to Napoli the policeman and everybody was given a photograph
And they all recognized it as something really different
They wanted shake hands with Me
This one way
Another way is that you start seeing the blessings, and you start to see how it becomes so progressively
better materially physically emotionally spiritually.
Still on a mental level most of people recognize
but unless an entity is recognized in their heart there's no recognition
Already the heart is surrounded by seven auras of
The Seven Chakras and the Spirit, the Atma resides in
Your Heart. As it is on top your head here
resides the God Almighty Sadashiva so when Kundalini
touches that point you're spirit gets awakened
And the light of spirit starts spreading and it starts acting on your central nervous system
because automatically the vibrations, Chaitanya flow into your brain who enlighten
and your nerves.
But still the recognition on heart is not there, even without that you start feeling
cool breeze ,you can raise kundalini of others .You can cure people You do many things
Still it's not yet felt in hearts so much That why we have music art all these
things start opening your heart, but still it is not recognition because recognition
Is a mental activity of the Heart. How can Heart have a Mental Activity? This
another problem you all face and I know that. That recognition if It's a mental
activity Of The Heart how do we do? Say If You are a Christian born in a Christian
As soon as I see the photograph of Christ, immediately you feel it's Christ something.
Or if are a Hindu and when he sees the photograph of Shri Rama
Immediately we know that is Shri Ram
That kind thing
Recognition in heart
But the recognition
Of somebody living with You
Is very difficult
And you live on the cusp
of your mental activities only.
But to go deep down into you heart,
what should we do? People tell Me."
Mother how shall be get in our hearts
How this mental activity can be performed through the heart
Now You must remember that heart is absolutely connected with brain
Absolutely connected
It's not disconnected thing.
If it was,
if would have worked too when heart fails after some time
brain also fails the whole body goes out of order
with a child is crying please take
out better take
out something wrong
but I live to try so this mental activity
of the heart is to be understood this way,
that as soon you see danger
without even thinking in a reflexed-way
your hear starts pumping more blood
and then you get palpitation.
You don't have think – there's no mental activity
just if suppose we've got tiger standing before us
immediately our hearts will start pumping
it'a a reflex action
Now how these activities take place one may say
is that because it's built-in within you,
as soon a see some emergency
your sympathetic nervous system goes into activity
and we start feeling the fear.
We started to feel
there should be protection
do something about but
You don't think just run
Run fast as possible
Don't think about what I should do, where
just you go on running away from the danger.
And how to that? Because it is built-in within
all this in your brain
as soon heart starts pumping
too much blood
It will make legs work
and hands work
or we can say
It is in the central nervous system, built-in – so fear.
Any reaction any response like that it's built within you but
The response to spirituality
Is not yet manifested
If its manifested
Its all build no doubt
But if it has not yet manifested
And how will manifest
That what people ask Me, Mother
How we'll manifest
Through your
You have learnt that you've to be afraid of this, you're to be afraid
Of That. Also in his lifetime he has learnt many things
For a child we put the hand on candle won't feel frightened
But grown up with it because an experience
With the experience gradually
You built-in
The reaction of reflex within you
So then try save yourself
What experience should I have
To build that in your heart is the point.
And experience of you own divinity, of your own spirituality – once start developing
experience, then you know that you are divine person.
Unless and until your aware fully
That You Are a Divine Person
How so ever faith you may have in Me
The recognition is not complete
Because who's recognizing me
Is the blind person
If A Blind person is recognizing Me
It won't Have that response of heart
So first
First you have to recognize yourself
To be a divine person,
and having faith in your Self.
We do not have faith
In ourselves though we are Sahaja Yogis
If there is any problem
They will write a letter to Me
if they're sick
Then I'll write them a letter
And when family questions
then i' ll write them
When somebody is bothering
Them with some question
The will ask
But if You become introspective
And meditative
Then you touch that Divinity within yourself.
When You touch the divinity,
then know your are a divine person
So in Sahastrara Puja actually
we have to recognize our own divinity
That you're Divine
by experiencing Your divinity
How do We experience Our divinity?
By giving Realization for others
It's great experience
To give Realization of others
Not only that, you give realization but
You can tell about their chakras.
What's wrong with them?
They are quite confident and mentally
they know that yes it is working
without getting involved into as I do
It will say Mother its working
Its happening this thing like
But never introspect
How am i working
How I am working it out, how can feel what has happened to me.
What is improved in Me?
What has sharpened In Me ?
.What Is the development of Me?
,what is the transformation?
Once you start thinking about It and the experience
then a kind of feeling, feeling towards the Mahamaya develops.
Feeling – again I say feeling like feeling
fear ,feeling happiness
feeling of depression
any feel you develop
and this felling
You could call a feeling of gratitude, feeling
love. Feeling of oneness
feeling joy all this starts
working in your heart and then
you feel the response
if supposing sea is responding to moon
that means it has mobility in it
A stone will not react to the moon.
In same way in your heart these waves of this feeling are created
by experience or spirituality,
but an experience for you own being
and then start expressing them
I could make it out
such a person may be so much talkative
may not know much about Sahaja Yoga, but in the heart.
The Heart he feels response is something to be achieved
because you now that center of heart
it's placed here –
the pitha or seat at your heart
on Brahmarandha.
If Your heart isn't open
and if You don' t have those responses built
They need not be of awe or fear, but a natural protocol that develops.
Then you can never do wrong because know whatever is good in your heart – supposing
You love somebody from Your Heart and are going to harm the person?
In same way when we start feeling those responses
in your heart, you can never do wrong because they are now manifesting which were built
within You.
Because there was spirituality –there was that divinity–which is built-in and now
it's manifesting!
And then we don't worry about things or anything outwardly.
It is said in Upanishads like Shandilyopanishad, Kanto-Panishad
it was this that once you know the Brahma
then all outside things
Like wearing a thread of Yajna Pavita and
All That should be thrown out.
Not necessary because now
You've got Sutra within yourself
Then we Should give up
All those outward things
Because inside is all built
In Now is expressing itself
And such a person automatically becomes
an yogi of very high caliber.
There was one gentleman in Calcutta,
his name is Mr Khan though he's a Hindu gentleman
and great scientist or physics
He was developing those feelings
One day
it was taking His bath
In the bathtub and fell down
on His back
And it completely broke and some of the splinters went into
brain,and he was in complete coma.
So much so that doctors gave up complete hope
about him saying that
He can never come back to life
but just before falling
Then I was in Delhi, they informed Me that he has fallen and this is what happened.
And said all right –I just paid attention to him, gave a bandhan.
Next day He opened His eyes the doctors could not believe it!
But then They removed Him into another ward where Sahaja Yogis went and said we will
give you vibration.
He said, but I'm not feeling any pain?
Nothing.
It's looking ten years younger now – it is so different!
Now the experience this
Is a complete thing for him
he absolutely into his divinity
So says Mother
i am person who doesn't think about anything
About life, death and what might
Now I know who you are.
And now that, I am under your protection and don't have to worry."
Another case was a Dr. Warlicka
Who had very bad heart so they made
Bypass for him
Great devotee
His bypass went out of order perhaps
He has got massive heart attack
he again went into coma
They put in the hospital
His aorta in the beginning was eighty percent clogged, so only twenty per cent was open.
There were no hopes!
So they did this bypass for him and he just said please send word to Mother that He
need not have done all also but doesn't matter I've put bandhan on Him as i'm
from Australia.
Here again it's given up case They say now how can we do another bypass?
This pass is finished what should be doing?
They are about to operate him and thinking about it, when he opened his eyes.
He told doctor – Doctor I am feeling all right?
…I don't know what has happened, I'm feeling perfectly alright can i sit up?
So the doctor couldn' t understand!
You felt His heart, you said that His Heart is doing very well…what's happen?
so they put Him on a test then found out That old aorta was open completely which
never happens in history of medicine
Now, this experience that he had about me is also because of his divinity.
I could work on him – the connection was so good and it worked!
But if you mentally go on analyzing everything
And mentally understanding Sahaja Yoga
You cannot reach to a state
Of Divinity from where
You receive all the blessings, starts pouring on you in every way.
If your hear how these people were helped as far money was concerned
As for...as buildings where concern
The transports what's concern
Everything as if somebody is working it out
Even when mentally sahaja yogis
All this things work out
But we are definitely help
When your divinity is manifesting in a very,
Very big way.
In such A Big Way that it Is not possible otherwise
These are Not Miracles
For Human beings these might be miracles
But for God It's not
After all the whole world He has created
The Whole Universes he Has created
Universes of universes he has created
So, what is so great for him?
But this the faith with experience.
Not a blind thing!

and the source

how important it Is

and these has To Open out

feel their love within a heart
and then
put yourself
